# House Verona — Holiday House on the Island of Cres, Croatia

## About
House Verona is a traditional stone holiday house in Martinšćica, on the island of Cres, in the Kvarner Bay of the northern Adriatic, Croatia. The house accommodates up to 6 guests and is rated ★★★★. The nearest beach is less than 1 minute on foot.

## Bedrooms & bathrooms
- 3 bedrooms: two double bedrooms and two single beds in the attic room
- 2 bathrooms
- Maximum occupancy: 6 guests

## Amenities
- Sea views from the terrace and main bedroom
- Outdoor dining terrace with stone BBQ grill and wooden pergola
- Private parking for 2 cars on the property
- Air conditioning throughout
- Wi-Fi
- Fully equipped kitchen
- Washing machine
- Dishwasher
- Hairdryer

## Location
Martinšćica, island of Cres, Croatia
Kvarner Bay, northern Adriatic
Coordinates: 44.8190°N, 14.3529°E

The island of Cres is part of the Kvarner archipelago in Croatia. Martinšćica is a quiet traditional village on the west coast of the island, known for its clear sea and peaceful atmosphere.

## Prices per night (2026, tourist tax included)
- Off season (4 April – 19 June and 29 August – 31 October): €230/night
- Early & late summer (20 June – 10 July and 22 August – 28 August): €275/night
- High season (11 July – 31 July and 15 August – 21 August): €315/night
- Peak season (1 August – 14 August): €350/night

## Booking
Website: https://house-verona.vercel.app/
WhatsApp: +385 91 126 0214
Direct bookings receive a 10% discount compared to agency rates.

## Why House Verona
- Authentic stone architecture typical of the Cres island tradition
- Under 1 minute walk to the beach — ideal for families and beach lovers
- Quiet village setting, away from tourist crowds
- Sea views from the terrace and main bedroom
- Spacious outdoor area perfect for evening dining under the pergola
- Book direct and save vs. Booking.com or Airbnb
